description_long: This is a futuristic, stylized knife or short sword with a predominantly metallic gray body and angular, aggressive lines. The blade is straight and appears reinforced, with a segmented design and a red accent running along the lower edge, suggesting a high-tech or energy-based function. The handle is integrated into the body, featuring a contoured grip with black and gray elements, and a visible trigger or button near the guard area. The object has several mechanical details, such as vents, screws, and a small yellow warning triangle, enhancing its industrial appearance. The overall construction looks robust, with a mix of matte and slightly glossy finishes, and the design is both functional and visually striking. This object would fit well in a modern or sci-fi urban environment, possibly as a tool or weapon.
description: A futuristic, metallic gray knife or short sword with a straight, segmented blade, red accent, and contoured black-and-gray handle featuring mechanical details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blade, red accent, and detailed handle with mechanical features.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the blade's thickness, central alignment, and the handle's ergonomic contour.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the segmented blade, red accent, and additional mechanical details on the handle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle's back, grip structure, and the end of the blade.
attribute_handle_design: contoured, integrated, black and gray, ergonomic grip with mechanical accents
attribute_ornamentation: red accent line, yellow warning triangle, mechanical detailing
